name: users
description: Service responsible for user management and authentication.

scripts.test: npm run build:ts && tsc -p test/tsconfig.json && c8 node --test -r ts-node/register "test/**/*.ts"
scripts.start: npm run build:ts && TS_NODE_BASEURL=./dist node -r tsconfig-paths/register dist/app.js
scripts.dev: npm run build:ts && concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "TypeScript,App" -c "yellow.bold,cyan.bold" "npm:watch:ts" "npm run dev:start"
